positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical emblem design featuring a majestic bioluminescent arctic fox silhouette embracing geometric celestial elements, such as overlapping crystalline moons and constellations. The fox should be depicted in a dynamic, flowing pose, rendered with stark white and deep cobalt blue ink accents against a dark midnight gradient. The overall composition must be clean, scalable, and suitable for central placement on a t-shirt. Incorporate intricate linework, negative space contrast, and a vaporwave aesthetic blended with Nordic folklore motifs. High contrast, vector art feel, graphic novel style, studio lighting, maximal detail, perfect symmetry, minimalist yet complex.
